en.extract:
The rusty thicketbird (Cincloramphus rubiginosus) is a bird species. Previously placed in the "Old World warbler" family Sylviidae, it does not seem to be a close relative of the typical warblers; probably it belongs in the grass warbler family Locustellidae. It is found in New Britain only.

''Megalurulus rubiginosus'' }} The '''rusty thicketbird''' ('''''Cincloramphus rubiginosus''''') is a [[bird]] [[species]]. Previously placed in the "[[Old World warbler]]" [[Family (taxonomy)|family]] [[Sylviidae]], it does not seem to be a close relative of the [[typical warbler]]s; probably it belongs in the grass warbler family [[Locustellidae]]. It is found in [[New Britain]] only. ==References== {{Reflist}} {{Taxonbar|from=Q62132615|from2=Q2667893}} [[Category:Cincloramphus|rusty thicketbird]] [[Category:Birds of New Britain]] [[Category:Birds described in 1881|rusty thicketbird]] [[Category:Taxa named by Philip Sclater|rusty thicketbird]] [[Category:Taxonomy articles created by Polbot]] [[Category:Endemic birds of Papua New Guinea]] {{Locustellidae-stub}}
